description: Implemented the MDI patient-linkage gap between precheck and questionnaire bootstrap. After precheck, the intake UI now collects transient demographics, POSTs them to /api/onboarding/mdi/patient, creates an MDI patient with retry-aware linkage/idempotency, stores only the MDI patient pointer locally, and sets a session-bound httpOnly questionnaire context cookie. /onboarding/mdi/bootstrap now blocks precheck-complete users without an MDI patient id and redirects them back to /intake for patient profile collection. Questionnaire selection supports APOTH_MDI_QUESTIONNAIRE_IDS by treatment with fail-closed behavior when a configured mapping is missing. Added the matching serverless Lambda/API route and CDK wiring. Verified with app typecheck, full app Vitest suite, focused onboarding tests, and focused infra stack/MDI Lambda tests. Infra build still has unrelated ambient failures in existing Stripe typings and infra alias resolution.
title: Create MDI patient linkage before questionnaire bootstrap
